title: AngelSkar Vanilla+
description: This is a modpack created to optimize the vanilla experience without adding any new blocks, mobs or anything, simply optimizing the game and adding simple Qol mods like Journeymap or Mousetweaks
body:
AngelSkar Vanilla+ is a simple mod pack created to optimize the vanilla experience and add some cool Qol (Quality of life) mods.

The modpack has several mods aimed at optimizing the rendering like Nvidium and Sodium which should help you achieve the highest possible framerate.

Other than the optimization mods the modpack also includes some cool Qol mods, which includes a minimap/worldmap (journeymap), Appleskin, a mod that gives you some extra info regarding hunger, clickthrough, a mod that allows you to open chest even if they are covered by signs or itemframes and many more cool features
